fn parallel_matching_mt<V: StT + MtT + Hash + 'static>(graph: &UnDirGraphMtEph<V>, seed: u64) -> SetStEph<Edge<V>>
            requires Self::spec_vertexmatchingmteph_wf(graph);

fn should_select_edge<V: StT + MtT + Hash + 'static>(
        graph: &UnDirGraphMtEph<V>,
        edge: &Edge<V>,
        edge_coins: &HashMapWithViewPlus<Edge<V>, bool>,
    ) -> (selected: bool)
        requires valid_key_type_Edge::<V>(),
        ensures true,

fn greedy_matching<V: StT + Hash>(graph: &UnDirGraphStEph<V>) -> SetStEph<Edge<V>>
            requires Self::spec_vertexmatchingsteph_wf(graph);

fn parallel_matching_st<V: StT + Hash>(graph: &UnDirGraphStEph<V>, seed: u64) -> SetStEph<Edge<V>>
            requires Self::spec_vertexmatchingsteph_wf(graph);
